name: anemia
title: best herbal teas for anemia
description: Camellia sinensis tea contains bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, theaflavins, and thearubigins, which have been found to help alleviate anemia due to their iron-uptake enhancing properties. The high antioxidant content in Camellia sinensis tea also helps to combat oxidative stress, a common factor associated with anemia.
